app.name: BoredRoom
app.tagline: Scan QR make you join the game

lobby.rulesBeforeReady: Read di rules before you ready
lobby.waitingReady: We dey wait for everybody to ready
lobby.scanToJoinLong: Scan QR make you join di game

gameOver.replaySavedToast: Replay don save — link don copy

steps.title: Roll dice, move
steps.body: Run 60 squares for di Naija board. You go land for shop, scam, blessing and wahala.

steps.title: Hustle cards
steps.body: Every few squares you go pick card. Play am to push, protect or scam person.

steps.title: Japa to win
steps.body: Reach UK, Canada or US exit with money and documents — first to japa win.

steps.title: Drop letter for board
steps.body: Build word like Scrabble. English, Pidgin and Naija slang dey score.

steps.title: Bonus tiles
steps.body: Land on di coloured squares to multiply your score.

steps.title: Highest score win
steps.body: Game finish when bag empty or after 6 pass for row.

steps.title: Buy property
steps.body: Roll dice, land on street, buy am sharp sharp. Collect colour set to build.

steps.title: Build, charge rent
steps.body: Houses and hotels make rent expensive. Trade with rivals to lock di colour group.

steps.title: Last person standing
steps.body: Make your rivals broke to carry crown.

steps.title: Two teams
steps.body: We go split una into Team Red and Team Yellow. Una go take turn for inside team.

steps.title: Drop disc
steps.body: On your turn, tap one column. Your team colour go drop to di lowest empty space.

steps.title: Connect four
steps.body: First team wey line up four discs (any direction) win di match.

ettt.title: How to play Endless Tic Tac Toe

steps.title: Two teams
steps.body: Team X and Team O dey take turn drop mark. Auto-balanced when host start.

steps.title: 3 marks per team
steps.body: Each team fit only get 3 marks for di board. If you drop 4th, una oldest mark go disappear.

steps.title: Line up 3
steps.body: First team to get 3 of dem marks for line win.

spotlight.yourFirstMove: Na your first move be dis

controller.joining: Dey put you for di match…
controller.joiningBody: Hold on small, we dey enter you for di board.
controller.waitingHostNewRound: Dey wait for host to start new round
controller.youAlreadyRolled: You don roll already this turn.

ettt.oldestWillDisappear: ⚠️ Your oldest piece go disappear when you drop next.

hustle.joiningBody: Hold on small, we dey enter you for di board.
hustle.noCardsYet: No card yet — keep dey move, you go draw.
hustle.alreadyRolled: You don roll already this turn.

trivia.waitingForOthers: We dey wait for other players…
trivia.waitingHostStart: We dey wait for host to start di quiz.
trivia.lockedHold: You don lock am. Hold on…
trivia.tapFastest: Tap your answer — fastest = plenty points
trivia.checkHost: Check di host screen for leaderboard.

whot.title: Whot (Beta)
whot.noCardsYet: No card yet — we dey wait for di deal.
whot.legendHelp: Green card legal now. Red card no legal for di rule.
whot.callShapeBody: You play Whot — choose di shape next person go match.

invalid.mustCall: You must call suit after you play Whot 20.
invalid.noWhotFinal: Whot 20 fit be your final card after LAST CARD.
invalid.pickChain2: Pick chain dey active: only another 2 fit counter.
invalid.pickChain3: Pick chain dey active: only another 5 fit counter.
invalid.generalMarket: General Market: go market draw card.

logo.title: Logo Guesser
logo.waitingHostStart: We dey wait for host start.
logo.lockedHold: You don lock am. Hold on…
logo.tapFastest: Tap your answer — fastest = plenty points
logo.checkHost: Check di host screen for standings.

colorWahala.title: Color Wahala
colorWahala.intro: Read di word. Or match di ink. Or tap wetin you HEAR.
colorWahala.waitingHostStart: We dey wait for host start.
colorWahala.lockedOut: DEM LOCK YOU — wait for next round
colorWahala.modeWord: Tap di WORD wey dey screen
colorWahala.modeColor: Tap di INK COLOR (no be di word!)

halfHalf.title: Half & Half
halfHalf.tagline: Find di perfect cut. Dey wait for host…
halfHalf.dragLock: Drag to your cut, then lock am

wordWahala.joiningBody: Hold on, we dey deal your rack.
wordWahala.bagEmptySwap: Bag don empty — you no fit swap.
wordWahala.pickTilesToSwap: Pick at least one tile to swap.
wordWahala.wildBody: Pidgin wild — e go only score for pidgin / slang / indigenous tier.
wordWahala.swapBody: Pick tiles to return. Bag get {{n}}. You go lose your turn.

replay.noTurnsRecorded: Turn-by-turn timeline no dey for dis match — we dey show final result only.
replay.notFound: We no fit find di replay
replay.notFoundBody: Dis replay link no valid abi dem don remove am.
